name: sonar
description: Sonar for SF life — skills that pull Luma and Partiful guest lists and search DirectorySF housing.

interface.shortDescription: Guest lists and SF housing search
interface.longDescription: Pull clean guest lists from Luma and Partiful events, or find and rank DirectorySF housing matches.
defaultPrompt: Pull the guest list from this Luma event.
Extract guests from this Partiful event.
Find DirectorySF housing matches for me.
